name: Degenbrecher
description:
“Nice gimmick, nerd. Now check this out.”

Guard Operator Degenbrecher from Arknights. Former three-time champion of Kazimierz Major and bodyguard of the President of Karlan Trade, Enciodes Silverash. Due to the contract signed by the Doctor and Enciodes, she joined Rhodes Island as an operator for indefinite amount of time.

Degenbrecher is, without a doubt, one of my most favourite Operators in Arknights. I’m madly in love with her design, The Rides to Lake Silberneherze event made me love her even more (I got the whole medal set too), and she is absolutely busted as a Swordmaster. One of my proudest pulls for sure.
creator: Anarchy_Shu
